title: Expression of Interest: LPG Super Dealers in Tanzania
description: TotalEnergies Marketing Tanzania Limited is seeking dynamic partners to distribute LPG products across the country. Requirements: high integrity, adherence to TotalEnergies policies and Health & Safety standards, strategic market penetration, exclusive distribution contract, capacity for trucks and storage, proven sales ability, FMCG experience preferred, customer centricity, team management. Capital expenditure: Minimum TZS 50-70 million.
